title: The Bear Season 3
synopsis: Carmy, Sydney, and Marcus do whatever it takes to elevate their Chicago beef sandwich shop into an elite fine dining institution.
notes: Exquisite tension and kitchen drama pacing. The cinematography is incredibly raw.

tasks.text: Write a list of high-end recipes to test out matching the show

title: The Last of Us Season 2
synopsis: Five years after their dangerous journey across the post-pandemic United States, Joel and Ellie find peace in Jackson, Wyoming.
notes: Ready to cry. The adaptation from the console game storyline looks highly faithful.
